---
title: "Milan Lstibůrek"
image: profile.jpg
toc: false
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:lstiburek@fld.czu.cz
    - icon: building
      text: CZU Profile
      href: https://home.czu.cz/lstiburek/uvod
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/mlstiburek
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
    - icon: mortarboard
      text: ResearchGate
      href: https://researchgate.net
---

## About Me

I am a Professor of Forest Genetics at the Czech University of Life Sciences Prague (CZU). My research focuses on quantitative genetics, forest tree breeding, and the optimization of genetic gain and diversity.

## News

-   **2026:** Just setting up my new website!
